books.title: A Moment of Cruelty

books.title: A Rose Watered with Blood

books.title: Accursed Eternity
books.synopsis: An Inquisitor of the Ordo Malleus, Remigius, gathers Space Marines of the Blood Swords and Star Dragons for what should be a straightforward boarding action: storm and cleanse the drifting hulk known as the Accursed Eternity. But the ship is no derelict. As the warriors push…

books.title: Adeptus Mechanicus Omnibus

books.title: Aestred Thurga: Pyre of Faith

books.title: After Desh'ea

books.title: Age of Darkness

books.title: Ahriman: Eternal

books.title: Ahriman: Exile
books.synopsis: Ahriman, once chief sorcerer of the Thousand Sons, is the architect of the Rubric — the catastrophic spell that doomed his beloved Legion to crumble into dust. Broken by guilt and hunted by his own former brothers, he wanders the Eye of Terror under a false name, reduced to a…

books.title: Ahriman: Exodus
books.synopsis: A companion collection to the Ahriman trilogy, these eight tales fill the spaces between the novels and deepen the sorcerer's circle of followers. The longer sequence, The Tale of Ctesias, follows the summoner Ctesias from his uneasy recruitment into Ahriman's cause through the…

books.title: Ahriman: Sorcerer
books.synopsis: Ahriman, greatest sorcerer of the Thousand Sons, now commands a fleet of his exiled brothers and has summoned the warlords of his scattered Legion. Still consumed by the need to mend the Rubric that turned his brothers to dust, he hunts a secret artefact — the Athenaeum of…

books.title: Ahriman: The Omnibus

books.title: Ahriman: Unchanged

books.title: Ahriman: Undying

books.title: All That Remains
books.synopsis: A hospital transport cast adrift in the warp carries the wounded of a hundred broken regiments — and a secret. As Horus's rebellion stretches the Imperium thin, the dead and dying are counted by the billion; greater still are those evacuated from the front to wait out the war in…

books.title: Alpharius: Head of the Hydra

books.title: Amor Fati

books.title: Anathemas
books.synopsis: Fourteen stories from thirteen authors gather under the Anathemas banner — Warhammer Horror at the scale of ordinary lives, threaded through hive sumps, mist-bound Mortal Realm cities and the quiet villages between. A musician hears voices in glass; a witch hunter learns to fear…

books.title: Angel of Fire

books.title: Angron

books.title: Angron: Slave of Nuceria

books.title: Angron: The Red Angel

books.synopsis: Tie-in novella to Games Workshop's Space Marine Heroes miniature line. The coastal Isle of St Capilene has been overrun by the Crimson Slaughter — a renegade Astartes chapter driven to butchery by the never-ceasing echoes of their victims. The renegades have found a daemonic…

books.title: Death of a Silversmith
books.synopsis: A silversmith lies dying on the floor of his workshop aboard the Warmaster's flagship Vengeful Spirit, and in the long minutes it takes him to bleed out, he counts his commissions. The Iron Hands gauntlet-case that made his name. The four silver rings he was asked to craft for…

books.title: Death of Integrity
books.synopsis: Having hunted a genestealer brood across the sector, Chapter Master Caedis of the Blood Drinkers calls upon old allies in the Novamarines to help him destroy a vast, drifting space hulk known as the Death of Integrity. They mean to obliterate it with plasma torpedoes, but the…

books.title: Death or Glory
books.synopsis: Chronologically the earliest Cain story in Amberley Vail's archive: a much younger Cain, en route to the agri-world Perlia under attack by Orks, is forced into an escape pod with his aide Jurgen when his troop transport is gutted in orbit. They crash-land far behind the enemy…

books.title: Death Rider

books.title: Death World
books.synopsis: A squad of Catachan Jungle Fighters under hard-bitten Sergeant Greiss is dropped onto Rogar III to break an Ork incursion by stealth and decapitate the warband at its head. But Rogar III is a death world in the truest sense: its jungle is awake, evolving new horrors to drive the…

books.title: Deathfire
books.synopsis: Vulkan, primarch of the Salamanders, lies in a coma-like state aboard the fortress-world of Macragge after the Fulgurite Spear pierced his hearts. His Pyre Guard captain Artellus Numeon refuses to accept his lord's death: ancient ritual demands that a fallen primarch be returned…

books.title: Deathwatch
books.synopsis: Drawn from a dozen different Chapters and forged into a single kill-team within an ironclad watch fortress, the Space Marines of Talon Squad are alien-hunters without equal. Under the cold command of the enigmatic Inquisitor Sigma, and led by the Death Spectres Librarian Lyandro…

books.title: Deathwatch (Legends)
books.synopsis: The Deathwatch are the Imperium's silent shield against the alien — elite Space Marines drawn from a hundred Chapters and sworn to hunt the xenos wherever it threatens humanity. When two terrible enemies converge on the remote Kurbynola System, an ork invasion crashing headlong…

books.title: Deathworlder
books.synopsis: On the dying world of Lazulai, all but lost to the tyranids, Major Wulf Khan of the Catachan 903rd 'Night Shrikes' is handed one last mission: lead a squad through the apocalypse to recover a piece of archeotech that could doom or deliver the entire Lazulai System.

books.title: Deliverance Lost
books.synopsis: Cut down to a few hundred warriors by the trap on Isstvan V, Corax brings what is left of the Raven Guard back to Terra and begs an audience with the Emperor. Granted access to the original gene-tech of the Primarch Project, he returns to Deliverance to forge a new generation of…

books.title: Demolisher
books.synopsis: Lieutenant Hadeya Etsul and the battered crew of the Leman Russ Demolisher Steel Tread survived Croatoas once; now their reward is fame, propaganda attention, and transfer into another offensive on the same meat-grinder world. Their tank is patched together, their replacement…

books.title: Descent of Angels
books.synopsis: On the feral world of Caliban, the great beasts hunt children in the woods and the knightly Order under Lion El'Jonson hunts them back. Two young cousins, Zahariel and Nemiel, rise from squire to knight through the Order's long apprenticeship, learning steel and stoicism under…

books.title: Desert Raiders
books.synopsis: When a remote listening station catches a garbled plea for help, a regiment of Tallarn Desert Raiders is sent to the parched world of Khadar to answer it. The regiment is freshly stitched together from two proud older formations, and the seams show: old rivalries and wounded…

books.title: Deus Encarmine
books.synopsis: On the cemetery world of Cybele, the Blood Angels fight a losing battle against the Word Bearers, until the young battle-brother Arkio turns the tide with a victory so miraculous that his brothers begin to whisper he is the reincarnation of their primarch, Sanguinius. As Arkio…

books.title: Deus Sanguinius
books.synopsis: The Blood Angels stand on the brink of civil war. Proclaiming himself the reborn Sanguinius, Arkio commands his brothers to follow him or die, and the Chapter splinters into rival camps. His elder brother Rafen, certain that Arkio has been corrupted by the schemes of the…

books.title: Distant Echoes of Old Night
books.synopsis: A loyalist strike cruiser of the Imperial Fists has been brought down over a forested moon, and its survivors are running for their lives through trees that have already begun to die. The Death Guard chaplain Murnau hunts them. His brothers are slow but very thorough, and when…

books.title: Divination
books.synopsis: As Inquisitor Covenant moves against the Triumvirate, the labour of his hunt falls across a small army of allies, rogues and rivals. Divination gathers their stories. A swordmistress weighs the weight of her own oaths; a covert agent runs the alleys of a shrineworld in pursuit…

books.title: Dominion Genesis
books.synopsis: Gryphonne IV, one of the mightiest forge worlds of the Adeptus Mechanicus, has been devoured by Hive Fleet Leviathan. Its surviving tech-priests are left adrift, stripped of purpose and home. Explorator Talin Sherax refuses to accept oblivion. When word reaches her of a…

books.title: Double Eagle
books.synopsis: Sabbat Worlds Crusade companion novel to Gaunt's Ghosts, taking the Crusade to the skies above Enothis. The elite Phantine XX fighter wing — including Commander Bree Jagdea — arrives on the desert-coast war-front in a desperate hour, with Chaos air forces driving Imperial cover…

books.title: Dreadwing
books.synopsis: With the Ruinstorm broken and Guilliman and Sanguinius racing for Terra, the Lion has turned his Dark Angels to a colder errand: the systematic burning of every traitor world he can reach. Among the ash-fields and dead orbital docks, his Wing lieutenants begin to wonder whether…

books.title: Dreams of Unity
books.synopsis: Decades after the last surviving Thunder Warriors were hunted from the Throneworld, a handful still walk Terra's underlevels, their failing bodies leased out as muscle and curiosity. Dahren Heruk is one such relic, too stubborn to die quickly and too useful to die in peace, and…

books.title: Dredge Runners
books.synopsis: Baggit, a fast-talking ratling sniper with a flexible conscience, and Clodde, an ogryn with a decent heart and big plans, have landed in the wrong column of a vicious crime lord's ledger. Tabidiah Kruger doesn't take losses well — and to get clear of him, the two abhuman…

books.title: Dropsite Massacre
books.synopsis: When Horus's rebellion is revealed, Rogal Dorn and Malcador the Sigillite dispatch the largest loyalist force ever assembled to crush the uprising before it can spread. Three entire Legions — the Iron Hands, Raven Guard, and Salamanders — descend on Isstvan V expecting to…

books.title: Duty Calls
books.synopsis: The 597th rejoins Lord General Zyvan's task force on Periremunda just in time to find the world simultaneously menaced by a Tyranid splinter fleet, an emerging Chaos cult, and a hidden genestealer infestation that has already replaced parts of the planetary administration. Cain…

books.title: Duty Waits
books.synopsis: After the Alpha Legion's brazen infiltration of the Imperial Palace, security on Terra has hardened to a knife edge. Captain Maximus Thane and his Imperial Fists company stand watch over a populace pushed to its limit by rationing, curfew, and the suffocating expectation that…

books.title: Eater of Dreams
books.synopsis: Fel Zharost used to be the Chief Librarian of the VIII Legion. He saw what was coming in the Night Lords and walked away long before Isstvan, exiling himself to the warrens of old Albia, where he tried to die quietly under another name. He does not get to. Malcador the Sigillite…

books.title: Echoes of Eternity
books.synopsis: Horus's host advances through the fire and ash of Terra's dying breaths, forcing the loyalists back to the Delphic Battlement — the very walls of the Sanctum Imperialis. Sanguinius, the Angel of the Ninth Legion, waits on the final battlements, rallying a desperate band of Blood…

books.title: Echoes of Imperium
books.synopsis: Echoes of Imperium is an audio anthology of four short dramas set inside the fragile realm of Imperium Secundus, the loyalist remnant cut off from Terra. Andy Smillie's "The Herald of Sanguinius" finds the newly crowned Emperor-Regent on Macragge under threat from within, with…

books.title: Echoes of Revelation
books.synopsis: Echoes of Revelation is the second audio drama anthology of the Horus Heresy, collecting three short pieces that turn on faith, severance and revelation. Dan Abnett's "Perpetual" picks up Oll Persson and his band of refugees, becalmed somewhere in the warp on their long road…

books.title: Echoes of Ruin
books.synopsis: Echoes of Ruin is the first audio drama anthology of the Horus Heresy, collecting seven short pieces from the years of betrayal. David Annandale's "Veritas Ferrum" drops listeners into the fleet battle above Isstvan V as the Iron Hands try to survive the treachery of their…

books.title: Echoes of the Long War
books.synopsis: The ork war has reached its grim halfway point and patience has run out. On Terra, Koorland, the last true son of Dorn, finally loses faith in the paralysed government and, with Drakan Vangorich at his side, moves to seize control of the Imperium's leadership outright. Far from…

books.title: Eidolon: The Auric Hammer
books.synopsis: On the eve of the Siege of Terra, Lord Commander Primus Eidolon — the Auric Hammer, the Risen, the Soul-Severed — has fallen far from grace. Once Fulgrim's most decorated lieutenant in the Emperor's Children, he is now a creature compromised by the warp, his appetites and his…

books.title: Eisenhorn Omnibus
books.synopsis: Omnibus collecting Xenos, Malleus and Hereticus plus the short stories "Missing in Action" and "Backcloth for a Crown Additional" — the full first arc of Inquisitor Gregor Eisenhorn's record. Across two centuries of in-universe time he advances from puritan Amalathian to radical…

books.title: Eldar Prophecy
books.synopsis: On the isolated craftworld Kaelor — drifting through the dark reaches, its society fragmented into quasi-feudal Houses scarred by recent House Wars and its Aspect Temples withdrawn from public life — the young warrior Naois comes of age as the unwitting subject of an old…

books.title: Elemental Council

books.title: Ember of Extinction

books.title: Emperor's Mercy

books.title: Empire of Lies

books.title: Endeavour of Will

books.title: Enforcer Omnibus

books.title: Engines of War

books.title: Ephrael Stern: The Heretic Saint

books.title: Era Of Ruin

books.title: Eye of Terra

books.synopsis: When the White Consuls answer a distress call from the void, they expect a rescue. What waits for them is far worse than the plea suggested. As a psychic shockwave tears through their astropathic choir, the Space Marines realise they have been drawn into a design far older and…

books.title: Fear to Tread
books.synopsis: Lured deep into the Signus Cluster by what looks like an Imperial system gone silent, Sanguinius brings the Blood Angels in expecting a routine Compliance and finds Horus's first deliberate move against his most trusted brother. The cluster has been remade as a warp anchor by…

books.title: First and Only

books.title: Fist of Demetrius
books.synopsis: As the Macharian Crusade reaches its zenith, Lord Solar Macharius is drawn by prophecy toward the world of Demetrius and the relic that gives this tale its name — the Fist of Demetrius, an ancient gauntlet rumoured to have belonged to a primarch of legend. With such a weapon,…

books.title: Fist of the Imperium

books.title: Five Candles

books.title: Flames of Betrayal
books.synopsis: In the ashes of Terra, the wounds of the Horus Heresy fester. The conflict between Horus Lupercal and the Emperor has reached its bloody end, but the cost of that ending has barely begun to be reckoned. This collected volume brings together two threads of the immediate…

books.title: Flesh and Steel

books.title: Flesh of Cretacia

books.title: Flesh Tearers

books.title: For the Emperor

books.title: Forges of Mars Omnibus

books.title: Forgotten Sons

books.title: Fulgrim

books.title: Fulgrim: The Palatine Phoenix

books.title: Fury of Magnus

books.title: Galaxy in Flames

books.title: Garro: Ashes of Fealty

books.title: Garro: Burden of Duty

books.title: Garro: Knight of Grey

books.title: Garro: Oath of Moment

books.title: Garro: Vow of Faith

books.title: Garro: Weapons of Fate
